name: Angel's Tip
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour white creme de cacao into a pousse-cafe glass.
2. Carefully pour sweet cream over the creme de cacao, being careful not to mix the ingredients.
- To do this, hold a teaspoon with the bottom side up over the glass and slowly pour the cream over it.
3. Place a cherry on top of the cream mixture. This is also known as a King Alphonse when the cherry is added.
